DUCKY INTELLIGENCE

Visual Reference Sheet
CVG-DUCKY-VISREF-v1.0  |  March 15, 2026  |  Cavaridge, LLC  |  19 Reference Images

Signature Poses — Core Character

These are the definitive Ducky poses that establish her core personality. Use these as primary references for animation key frames and marketing materials.

Idle / Listening

The Regal

IMG_1768.jpeg

Seated on chair arm, chin up, composed. Default Idle state reference. Purple collar visible. This IS Ducky.

Explaining

The Approach

IMG_1931.jpeg

Walking toward camera with confident stride. Mouth slightly open, alert expression. Teaching/Explaining energy.

Idle (relaxed)

The Lounge

IMG_1991.jpeg

Relaxed on navy cushion, one paw extended. Casual confidence, aware but at ease. Secondary Idle variant.

Expressive Close-ups — Eye & Face Detail

Critical references for facial rigging and eye rendering. The eyes are Ducky's most important expressive feature — they must convey depth, warmth, and intelligence.

Reference only

Macro Portrait A

IMG_1399.jpeg

Extreme close-up. Rich brown iris detail, specular highlights, nose leather texture. Relaxed, contemplative expression.

Reference only

Macro Portrait B

IMG_1401.jpeg

Alternate close-up angle with slightly different lighting. Note the warmth gradient from nose to forehead.

Thinking

Pink Hearts Profile

IMG_1599.jpeg

Side profile in heart-print outfit. Shows ear drape length, muzzle shape, and jawline definition.

Warm & Empathetic — Comfort States

These photos capture Ducky's nurturing side. Use for Empathetic/Supportive animation states and error recovery contexts.

Empathetic

Sweater Snuggle

IMG_1508.jpeg

Multicolor knit sweater, nestled against purple pillow. Soft eyes, completely relaxed. Core Empathetic reference.

Empathetic

Blanket Rest

IMG_1645.jpeg

Lying on dark blanket, front paws extended, gentle direct gaze. Approachable, non-threatening.

Sleeping

Lap Curl

IMG_0694.jpeg

Curled up asleep in someone's lap. Complete trust. Sleeping/Away animation reference.

Idle (cozy)

Cozy Chair

IMG_1522.jpeg

In knit sweater on outdoor chair with striped cushion. Seated, composed, warm. Styled Idle variant.

Playful & Energetic — Joy States

Captures of Ducky's playful, joyful side. Reference for Happy/Success and Playful/Encouraging animation states.

Playful

Toy Time

IMG_0664.jpeg

Under patio table with purple toy, chin flat on striped rug, big puppy eyes looking up. Peak playfulness.

Happy / Success

Dinner Joy

IMG_1506.jpeg

Standing by food bowls, tongue out mid-lick, looking up with pure happiness. Goofy joy moment.

Playful (vocal)

Evening Howl

IMG_1940.jpeg

Standing on deck railing at night, mouth open mid-vocalization. Expressive, uninhibited energy.

Onboarding

Puppy & Toys

78240538034__5EBFCAFA-2EA0-4EF2-88E2-D257B26A765B.jpeg

Young Ducky on gray blanket with chew toys. Wide-eyed innocence. Onboarding sequence reference.

Alert & Sassy — Assertive States

When Ducky needs to get your attention or gently push back. These capture her confident, no-nonsense side.

Sassy

The Stare

IMG_1634.jpeg

Wrapped in towel on blue cooler. Direct, unflinching gaze. "Are you sure?" energy. Primary Sassy reference.

Alert

Pink Hoodie Alert

IMG_0032.jpeg

Sitting upright in pink hoodie on blue leather chair. Ears forward, big eyes, fully attentive. Alert state reference.

Idle (watchful)

Poolside Watch

IMG_1748.jpeg

Lying by pool edge, gazing into distance. Calm but watchful. Background monitoring energy.

On the Move — Adventure & Companion

Ducky as the loyal companion. References for transitional animations and the sense that she's always with you.

Active

Walk Day

IMG_1584.jpeg

On sidewalk in purple floral harness, looking directly at camera. Ready for anything. Confident companion.

Companion

Ride Along

IMG_1375.jpeg

Lying on red car seat, peeking between front seats with big eyes. Travel companion. Loyal presence.

Variant

Relaxed Landscape

IMG_1974.jpeg

Bonus landscape-orientation reference shot for horizontal layout contexts.
